Hero.label: Official department portal
Hero.title: Education Quality Control Department
Hero.text: A modern information platform for education quality monitoring, accreditation, analytics, documents, news and feedback.

Welcome.label: Welcome message from the head of department
Welcome.name: Farhod Rustamov
Welcome.position: Head of the Education Quality Control Department
Welcome.text: The Education Quality Control Department carries out systematic work to develop an internal culture of quality, monitor the educational process, prepare accreditation materials and ensure feedback from students, teachers, employers and institutional partners.

items.title: Education quality monitoring
items.text: Monitoring attendance, academic performance, teaching quality and the learning environment.

items.title: Accreditation
items.text: Preparation of materials, self-assessment, quality indicators and accreditation support.

items.title: Documents
items.text: Regulations, orders, forms, templates and methodological materials.

items.title: Surveys
items.text: Surveys of students, teachers, graduates and employers.

items.title: Analytics
items.text: Preparation of reports, analytical notes and recommendations for institute management.

items.title: Feedback
items.text: Processing proposals, comments and appeals from participants of the educational process.
